A remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability affects versions `0.13.2` through `0.13.21`. When documentation endpoints are publicly accessible and validation rules reference user-controlled input, request supplied data may be evaluated during documentation generation, leading to execution of arbitrary PHP code in the application context.

### Patches

Fixed in version `0.13.22`.

### Workarounds

If upgrading is not immediately possible:

* Restrict access to documentation endpoints (`/docs/api`, `/docs/api.json`)
* Avoid using user-controlled variables inside validation rule expressions (e.g., values derived from request input)
* Disable documentation endpoints in production environments if not required

These measures significantly reduce or prevent exploitability.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0586, "percentile": 0.92237}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4rm2-28vj-fj39", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T19:54:56Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4rm2-28vj-fj39", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4rm2-28vj-fj39"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44262"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-12T22:16:36Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T19:54:56Z", "references": ["https://github.com/dedoc/scramble/security/advisories/GHSA-4rm2-28vj-fj39", "https://github.com/dedoc/scramble/releases/tag/v0.13.22", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44262", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4rm2-28vj-fj39"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/dedoc/scramble/security-advisories/GHSA-4rm2-28vj-fj39", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/dedoc/scramble", "summary": "Scramble vulnerable to remote code execution via evaluation of user-controlled input in validation rules", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T16:41:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4rm2-28vj-fj39", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.13.22", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "dedoc/scramble"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.13.2, <= 0.13.21"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Scramble vulnerable to remote code execution via evaluation of user-controlled input in validation rules
